entries.title: Access areas admin index.
entries.notes: Requires package migrations plus at least one seeded access area with a known route key, status, registration policy, and token policy.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews which protected areas are active and how each area accepts or blocks access requests.

entries.title: Access area create/edit form.
entries.notes: Capture the key, status, schedule, registration policy, token policy, approval limit, allowlist, and metadata fields. The batch harness still needs install-flow verification for access-gate migrations.
entries.useCase: An administrator configures a protected area before routing private content through the access-gate middleware.

entries.title: Registrations admin index with review actions.
entries.notes: Requires seeded pending, approved, rejected, and expired registrations tied to an access area so table filters and row actions are visible.
entries.useCase: An administrator triages access requests and uses approve, reject, resend claim, expire, or grant actions.

entries.title: Grants admin index.
entries.notes: Requires seeded active, expired, and revoked grants across at least one subject type.
entries.useCase: An administrator audits who currently has access and revokes grants that should no longer unlock protected content.

entries.title: Claim tokens admin index.
entries.notes: Requires seeded pending, consumed, and expired claim tokens linked to registrations or grants.
entries.useCase: An administrator checks whether approval links were issued, claimed, or expired.

entries.title: Browser tokens admin index.
entries.notes: Requires seeded active, expired, and revoked browser tokens tied to grants.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews browser-bound access and revokes a token after device loss or policy change.

entries.title: Access events admin index.
entries.notes: Requires seeded request, approval, rejection, claim, grant, revoke, and middleware-denied events.
entries.useCase: An administrator investigates the history of an access request or failed protected-page visit.

entries.title: Public access request form.
entries.notes: Capture anonymously against a seeded area that allows public registration. Verify the HTML contains no authoring markers, editor URLs, model IDs, or admin-only labels.
entries.useCase: A visitor requests access to a protected area by submitting the configured public registration fields.

entries.title: Public gated message.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded protected route using `access-gate:{area}` middleware and no active grant for the current visitor.
entries.useCase: A visitor without an active grant sees the blocked state instead of the protected content.

entries.title: Public request CTA component.
entries.notes: Capture direct access-gate submission in the base package. Capture the Public Actions variant only in a separate run with `capell-app/public-actions` installed.
entries.useCase: A visitor follows an inline request CTA from a protected page or teaser block.
